name: Uncle Shels Badlands BBQ Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Put basil, rosemary and jalapeno pepper into a blender with some wine, blend until herbs are chopped fine.
2. Mix all the liquid together, add the garlic, ginger and fresh ground pepper.
3. Mix well, let sit in a covered container in a cool place, not cold, placed in the kitchen.
4. Best to make the marinade a few days before the meat goes on the grill.
5. As the marinade sits, give it a stir or a shake once in awhile.
